title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/turn_builder.py (第 1 至 271 行，共 271 行) ---
   1 | # core/turn_builder.py
   2 | """Conversation turn builder for provider-safe context compression.
   3 | 
   4 | This module converts a flat provider message list into semantic turns.  The
   5 | important invariant is that OpenAI-style ``assistant.tool_calls`` plus their
   6 | immediately following ``tool`` responses are represented as one atomic turn so
   7 | compression strategies can avoid cutting the pair in half.
   8 | """
   9 | 
  10 | from __future__ import annotations
  11 | 
  12 | from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  13 | from typing import Any, Dict, Iterable, List, Optional, Set
  14 | 
  15 | 
  16 | @dataclass
  17 | class ConversationTurn:
  18 |     """A semantic, provider-safe unit of conversation history."""
  19 | 
  20 |     id: str
  21 |     start_index: int
  22 |     end_index: int
  23 |     messages: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  24 |     user_message: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
  25 |     assistant_messages: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  26 |     tool_messages: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  27 |     has_tool_calls: bool = False
  28 |     is_tool_pair_complete: bool = True
  29 |     missing_tool_call_ids: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  30 |     orphan_tool_call_ids: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  31 |     token_estimate: int = 0
  32 |     importance: float = 0.0
  33 |     categories: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  34 |     files_touched: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  35 |     errors: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  36 |     tests: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  37 | 
  38 |     @property
  39 |     def is_valid_openai_tool_turn(self) -> bool:
  40 |         """Whether this turn can be sent to OpenAI-compatible APIs as-is."""
  41 |         return not self.has_tool_calls or self.is_tool_pair_complete
  42 | 
  43 | 
  44 | class TurnBuilder:
  45 |     """Build complete conversation turns from a flat message list.
  46 | 
  47 |     Rules implemented for OpenAI-compatible tool calls:
  48 |     - an ``assistant`` message with ``tool_calls`` starts an atomic tool turn;
  49 |     - only immediately following contiguous ``tool`` messages can satisfy that
  50 |       assistant's tool calls;
  51 |     - missing tool responses mark the turn incomplete;
  52 |     - ``tool`` messages without an immediately preceding assistant tool-call
  53 |       turn are emitted as orphan/incomplete turns instead of being attached to
  54 |       unrelated context.
  55 |     """
  56 | 
  57 |     ERROR_KEYWORDS = ("error", "exception", "traceback", "失败", "错误", "报错")
  58 |     TEST_KEYWORDS = ("pytest", "test", "测试", "passed", "failed", "assertionerror")
  59 |     PLAN_KEYWORDS = ("plan", "任务", "步骤", "继续", "完成")
  60 | 
  61 |     def build(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[ConversationTurn]:
  62 |         """Return semantic turns while preserving original message order."""
  63 |         turns: List[ConversationTurn] = []
  64 |         i = 0
  65 |         while i < len(messages):
  66 |             msg = messages[i]
  67 |             if not isinstance(msg, dict):
  68 |                 i += 1
  69 |                 continue
  70 | 
  71 |             role = msg.get("role")
  72 | 
  73 |             if role == "assistant" and msg.get("tool_calls"):
  74 |                 turn, next_index = self._build_tool_call_turn(messages, i)
  75 |                 turns.append(turn)
  76 |                 i = next_index
  77 |                 continue
  78 | 
  79 |             if role == "tool":
  80 |                 turn, next_index = self._build_orphan_tool_turn(messages, i)
  81 |                 turns.append(turn)
  82 |                 i = next_index
  83 |                 continue
  84 | 
  85 |             turn = self._new_turn(
  86 |                 turn_index=len(turns),
  87 |           ...
